title: Register references/bsharp with update=none in .gitmodules

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
Optional bsharp style reference submodule no longer auto-updates on `git submodule update`; follows removal of bsharp from default manifest (`7aec056`).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Completed:** 2026-05-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Optional bsharp style reference submodule no longer auto-updates on `git submodule update`; follows removal of bsharp from default manifest (`7aec056`).
